'''Kanlee Fentetta''' was a prominent citizen of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

Sometime in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] or [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] his son died in what seemed to be a tragic [[Combat Aquaspeeder|aquaspeeder]] accident on [[Lake Paonga/Legends|Lake Paonga]]. However, a couple of months later, Fentetta learned that the reason for his son's death had been a botched kidnapping attempt by a group of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]. He also found out that the murderers were planning to abduct the child of another wealthy family and was determined to stop them. So he offered a handsome reward for a successful assault on the pirate's lair.

==Behind the scenes==
Fentetta is mentioned in the mission "Avenge murdered Naboo son," which is available at Mission Terminals on the planet Naboo in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''. To fulfill the mission the player has to attack a small random base and kill several enemy NPCs.
